prompt: I need to create a UserProfile component that fetches user data from /api/users/{id} when the component mounts, shows a loading spinner while fetching, and displays an error message if the request fails. Show me how to use useFetcher hook from @ahoo-wang/fetcher-react.
expected_output: A complete React component using useFetcher that handles loading, error, and success states with automatic request cancellation on unmount
expectations: Handles loading, error, and result states
Shows appropriate UI for each state
